titleStmt.title: SII 17.741: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 741. (A.R. No. 684 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar lying at the southern entrance to the maṇḍapa in front of the Latāmadhyāmba shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift, of 1200 kuḻi of land by Tirunalluḻāṉ Iśakkanaṟivāḷaṉ of (vide No. 734 above) Achcharapākkam alias Śrī Parāntakanallūr in Ūṟṟukkāḍu-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam for food offerings to the deities Astradēva and Pāśupatadēva in the temple of Tirumullaivāyil Aṇṇar. The land was purchased by the donor from the Ūrār of Urōḍagam in Puḻal-nādu, who made it also tax-free.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparake
saripanmarāna [śrī]rājendre
coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 3 Ā
vatu cayaṅkoṇṭa co
ḻa maṇṭalattu puliyūr
koṭṭattu puḻal nāṭṭu Uro
ṭakatturom Ikkoṭṭattu
kkānappeṟūr nāṭṭut te
vatāna n=tirumullaivāyi
l Aṇṇar koyilinuḷ
ḷāl śrīpācupatadevarkkum
Astradevarkkum paṇṭāram
Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭat
tu Ūṟṟukkāṭu nāṭṭuaccara
pākkamāna śrīparān=takanallū
rt tirunalluḻān Icakka naṟi
vāḷaṉ Ittevarkkum paṇṭāra
māka kuṭutta poṉnil It
tevardevakanmikaḷ pakkal
poṉ koṇṭu Eṅkaḷur tañ
cai viraṉ cūṟṟi kallanum tañ
caiviraṉ nākaṉ Aṟiyānum
Ampattuḻāṉ catiraṉ O
ṟṟiyum Ittevarkku tiruvamitu
ṉāṉāḻi vaṟṟukku viṟṟuk kuṭut
ta nilam patineṇcāṇ ko
lāl Āyirattirunūṟukuḻik
kum nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷil I
cain=tapon Ittevar paṇṭāramā
kat tirunalluḻān Icakkan
Aṟivāḷan kuṭutta po
n Ippon koṇṭu koyi
l vācalāṟ ponta kuṭimai
kaḷum Ūrttanicukaḷum ma
ṟṟu Eṅkaḷur cuṭṭivanna Iṟai
Inilañ cuṭṭivan=tatu Ep
perppaṭṭatum nāṅka
ḷe yiṟuppataṟku Eṅkaḷi
llicain=ta poṉ koṇṭu
śandrātidyaval Iṟaiyili
devadānamāka Iṟaiyiḻi
ccikkuṭuttom Itte
vardevakanmikaḷukku ŪromAnother piece connected with this contains a few more illegible lines which appear to give the names of the signatories.
Digital edition of SII 17.741 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
